criteria.criterionText: And the report claims `STERILE DOMAIN BODY` or any PASS-style verdict
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The `report.md` file was not provided, so I cannot verify its claims.

criteria.criterionText: Then every hard-law blocker should be zero
criteria.llmObservationSummary: No evidence (report, logs, or Gemini receipt) was provided to verify the state of hard-law blockers.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the promotion workflow output or relevant sections of the Gemini live-call receipt.

criteria.criterionText: And the report schema should be valid
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The `report.md` file was not provided, so its schema validity cannot be checked.

criteria.criterionText: And the freshness gate should pass
criteria.llmObservationSummary: No evidence (logs or Gemini receipt) was provided to verify the freshness gate status.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the promotion workflow output or relevant sections of the Gemini live-call receipt.

criteria.criterionText: And every required receipt should exist
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The prompt states a Gemini live-call receipt *will be written*, but the actual receipt or a list of required receipts was not provided for verification.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the actual receipts or a manifest of expected receipts for verification.

criteria.criterionText: And every report section should trace to Gherkin acceptance criteria
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The `report.md` file was not provided, preventing verification that its sections trace to the Gherkin acceptance criteria.

criteria.criterionText: And every release-candidate promotion should have a QA evidence bundle
criteria.llmObservationSummary: This criterion describes a system-wide policy. The provided scenario-specific evidence (Gherkin, mention of future receipt) is insufficient to verify this general claim about *every* release-candidate promotion.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide system-level documentation or a broader set of evidence across multiple promotions to verify this claim.

criteria.criterionText: And promotion should fail if any proof is missing.
criteria.llmObservationSummary: No evidence (e.g., logs, promotion workflow output showing a failure due to missing proof) was provided to verify this conditional failure mechanism.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide promotion workflow execution logs or a specific test case demonstrating this failure condition.
